settings.title: Shipping & Delivery
settings.content:
Same-day dispatch on orders placed before 2pm AEST (Mon–Fri).

  • Standard: 3–7 business days
  • Express: 1–3 business days
  • Free standard shipping on orders over $75

All orders are tracked and insured.

settings.title: Returns & Refunds
settings.content:
We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unopened, factory-sealed products in original condition.

Please contact us before sending a return. Refunds are processed within 3–5 business days of receiving the item.

settings.title: Authenticity Guarantee
settings.content:
Every product we sell is sourced directly from authorised distributors. We never sell resealed, tampered, or grey-market product.

All sealed product is inspected and shipped in protective packaging to ensure it arrives in perfect condition.
